---
name: Bug report
about: A broken link, a rendering glitch, a continuity slip, a typo
title: "[bug] <short description>"
labels: bug
---

**What's wrong**
What did you see? (A book, chapter, or page — a link if you can.)

**Where**
Which book/chapter/universe/character page, and on what device/browser?

**Expected**
What should have happened instead?
